architecture_revision: C-004 discovery: kernel holds no operational SurrealDB session at boot. User decision (D9): config store is API-owned — kernel exposes get/replace for effective_mcp_servers; librefang-api reads/writes the store. D10: process-global shared_pool() added (embedded RocksDB single-lock per path, assessment R-2 confirmed). C-003/C-005/C-006 placements revised accordingly.

C-005.scope: MCP write path only (user decision); provider-default + config_set deferred to C-005b

C-005b.scope: provider-default -> store + HTTP route tests + MockKernelBuilder temp-storage isolation; generic config_set deferred to C-005c

C-005c.note: generic config_set store migration: needs a kernel config-override merge layer applied at load/reload + security review for section-wholesale writes

C-007.note: single-row array + render_mcp_summary sort already guarantee prompt determinism; added config_store list() ORDER BY guard test

C-008.note: import CLI done + tested; HUMAN cluster verify pending (daemon-down import on prod PVC). C-009 hard-gated on that verify.

k8s_revert_gated_on: C-008 verified one-time import of existing prod config.toml
next_command: HUMAN: run C-008 prod import + verify, THEN /kbd-execute C-009
